canonical_form: The Girl with the Golden Fish Sign
card_description: The Girl with the Golden Fish Sign is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick explores the "profound mystery" of his identity shift in 3-74, concluding that his "PKD" personality was a retroactive replacement for his authentic "Thomas" personality."
